_meta.author: lavikatiyar
_meta.title: Image Uploader
_meta.description:
Image Uploader

The ImageUploader is a highly interactive and accessible component for handling file uploads. It supports drag-and-drop, file selection through a dialog, and provides animated previews of the selected images. Built with framer-motion, it offers smooth animations for adding and removing files, enhancing the user experience. It's fully themeable using shadcn/ui CSS variables and includes validation for file types and size.
